title: BAN short 75x +105.83% (EN)
body:
📊 Verified P&L — BAN/USDT Short · 75x · +105.83% (28m)

The idea: BAN spiked hard and printed a clear rejection at resistance — shorted the rejection.

The risk: stop was set just above the rejection wick before entry — if we're wrong, the loss is capped, not open-ended.

75x is high risk, no sugar-coating it. What carried this trade wasn't the leverage — it was that the exit-if-wrong was decided before the entry. You define the loss first, then you let the trade do its work.

⚠️ Past result, not a prediction. High leverage = high risk of total loss. Educational only, not financial advice.

#RealResults
